---
title: "Football_BN_Data_Learned"
author: "Jonah Yallop"
date: "2025-11-18"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r, include=FALSE}
library(bnlearn)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)
library(purrr)
library(gRain)
library(igraph)
library(verification)
library(zoo)
library(data.table)
```


```{r}
# Load in all matches since 1993/94 to build up conditional probability table
historical_matches <- read.csv("Data/historical_matches_elo.csv")

# Load in 25/26 fixtures for prediction
fixtures_2526 <- read.csv("Data/2025_26_fixtures.csv")
fixtures_2526['season'] <- "2025/26"

# Tables from 1993/94 - 2023/24
season_tables <- read.csv("Data/epl_tables.csv")

season_tables <- season_tables %>%
  rename(season = season_end_year)

# Current premier league table
current_table <- read.csv("Data/current_table.csv")

# Load in ELO ratings
elo_ratings <- read.csv("Data/elo_ratings.csv")
```

# 1. Building the learning dataset

```{r}
full_data <- historical_matches[! is.na(historical_matches$home_elo),]
# Convert all character columns to factor
for (col in names(full_data)) {
  if (is.character(full_data[[col]])) {
    full_data[[col]] <- as.factor(full_data[[col]])
  }
}

full_data$home_elo_bin <- 
  cut(full_data$home_elo,
      breaks = quantile(
        full_data$home_elo,
        probs = c(0, .25, .5, .75, 1), na.rm=TRUE
      ),
      include.lowest = TRUE,
      labels = c("rating1","rating2","rating3", "rating4"))

full_data$away_elo_bin <- 
  cut(full_data$away_elo,
      breaks = quantile(
        full_data$away_elo,
        probs = c(0, .25, .5, .75, 1), na.rm=TRUE
      ),
      include.lowest = TRUE,
      labels = c("rating1","rating2","rating3", "rating4"))
```

# 1.1 Adding in all variables included in the expert model - goal difference and expected points

```{r}
add_projected_variables_all_seasons <- function(results_all,
                                                season_points,
                                                compute_component1_mean,
                                                matches_per_gameweek = 10) {
  
  all_seasons <- sort(unique(results_all$season))
  
  results_augmented_list <- lapply(all_seasons, function(season_i) {
    
    cat("Processing season:", season_i, "\n")
    
    # Filter matches for this season only
    res_season <- results_all %>% filter(season == season_i)
    
    # Build standings for this season
    standings_season <- build_standings_by_gw(
      res_season,
      matches_per_gameweek = matches_per_gameweek
    )
    
    # Add expected points / projected GD for this season
    standings_with_exp <- add_exp_points_to_standings(
      results = res_season,
      standings_by_gw = standings_season,
      season_points = season_points,
      compute_component1_mean = compute_component1_mean,
      cur_season = season_i,
      matches_per_gameweek = matches_per_gameweek
    )
    
    # Calculate projected goal difference
    standings_with_exp$projected_goal_difference <- 
      standings_with_exp$goal_difference / 
      standings_with_exp$gameweek * 38
    
    # Rounding
    standings_with_exp <- standings_with_exp %>% 
      mutate(across("projected_goal_difference", round, 0))
    
    colnames(standings_with_exp)[colnames(standings_with_exp) == 'Mean'] <- 'current_exp_points'
    
    # Discretising current expected points
    standings_with_exp$current_exp_points_bin <- 
      cut(standings_with_exp$current_exp_points,
          breaks = quantile(
            standings_with_exp$current_exp_points,
            probs = c(0, .33, .66, 1), na.rm=TRUE
          ),
          include.lowest = TRUE,
          labels = c("Low","Med","High"))
        
    goaldiff_breaks <- c(-Inf, -30, -20, -10, 0, 10, 20, 30, Inf)  
    goaldiff_labels <- NULL
    
    n_gd_intervals <- length(goaldiff_breaks) - 1
    if (is.null(goaldiff_labels)) {
      lefts  <- head(goaldiff_breaks, -1)
      rights <- tail(goaldiff_breaks, -1)
      goaldiff_labels <- vapply(seq_len(n_gd_intervals),
                                function(i) paste0("(", lefts[i], ",", rights[i], "]"),
                                character(1), USE.NAMES = FALSE)
    } else {
      if (length(goaldiff_labels) != n_gd_intervals) {
        stop("goaldiff_labels length must equal number of intervals (length(goaldiff_breaks)-1).")
      }
    }
    
    standings_with_exp$goal_difference_bin <- cut(standings_with_exp$projected_goal_difference,
                                  breaks = goaldiff_breaks,
                                  labels = goaldiff_labels,
                                  include.lowest = TRUE)
    
    # Shift to get pre-game values
    standings_with_exp_pre <- standings_with_exp %>%
      mutate(gameweek = gameweek + 1)
    
    
    # Merge back onto match dataset
    res_season_aug <- res_season %>%
      left_join(
        standings_with_exp_pre %>%
          dplyr::select(gameweek, team, goal_difference_bin, current_exp_points_bin) %>%
          rename(
            home_team = team,
            home_goal_difference_bin = goal_difference_bin,
            home_current_exp_points_bin = current_exp_points_bin
          ),
        by = c("home_team", "gameweek")
      ) %>%
      left_join(
        standings_with_exp_pre %>%
          dplyr::select(gameweek, team, goal_difference_bin, current_exp_points_bin) %>%
          rename(
            away_team = team,
            away_goal_difference_bin = goal_difference_bin,
            away_current_exp_points_bin = current_exp_points_bin
          ),
        by = c("away_team", "gameweek")
      )
    
    return(res_season_aug)
  })
  
  bind_rows(results_augmented_list)
}
```

```{r}
full_data <- full_data %>%
  group_by(season) %>%
  mutate(
    row_in_season = row_number(),
    gameweek = ceiling(row_in_season / 10)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(-row_in_season)
```

```{r, warning=FALSE}
results_with_proj <- add_projected_variables_all_seasons(
  results_all = full_data,
  season_points = season_tables,
  compute_component1_mean = compute_component1_mean
)
```


```{r}
results_with_proj <- subset(results_with_proj, select = -c(match_id, home_goals, away_goals, season, home_elo, away_elo))
results_with_proj_home <- subset(results_with_proj, select = -c(home_team, away_team, away_elo_bin, away_goal_difference_bin, away_current_exp_points_bin,
                                                                date, gameweek))

results_with_proj_home <- results_with_proj_home %>%
    mutate(home_goal_difference_bin = if_else(is.na(home_goal_difference_bin), "(0,10]", home_goal_difference_bin))
results_with_proj_home <- results_with_proj_home %>%
    mutate(home_current_exp_points_bin = if_else(is.na(home_current_exp_points_bin), "Med", home_current_exp_points_bin))

results_with_proj_home[["home_goal_difference_bin"]] <- as.factor(results_with_proj_home[["home_goal_difference_bin"]])
results_with_proj_home[["home_current_exp_points_bin"]] <- as.factor(results_with_proj_home[["home_current_exp_points_bin"]])

# Drop unused factor levels
results_with_proj_home$result <- droplevels(results_with_proj_home$result)

# Make sure all predictors are factors too
factor_cols <- c("home_elo_bin","home_goal_difference_bin","home_current_exp_points_bin")
results_with_proj_home[factor_cols] <- lapply(results_with_proj_home[factor_cols], factor)

results_with_proj_home[] <- lapply(results_with_proj_home, function(x) {
  if(is.factor(x)) {
    levels(x) <- make.names(levels(x), unique = TRUE)
  }
  x
})
```

```{r}
# Tidying

results_with_proj$home_goal_difference_bin <- replace(results_with_proj$home_goal_difference_bin, is.na(results_with_proj$home_goal_difference_bin),"(0,10]")
results_with_proj$away_goal_difference_bin <- replace(results_with_proj$away_goal_difference_bin, is.na(results_with_proj$away_goal_difference_bin),"(0,10]")
results_with_proj$home_current_exp_points_bin <- replace(results_with_proj$home_current_exp_points_bin, is.na(results_with_proj$home_current_exp_points_bin),"Med")
results_with_proj$away_current_exp_points_bin <- replace(results_with_proj$away_current_exp_points_bin, is.na(results_with_proj$away_current_exp_points_bin),"Med")

df_bn <- results_with_proj %>%
  dplyr::select(home_goal_difference_bin, away_goal_difference_bin, home_current_exp_points_bin, away_current_exp_points_bin, result, home_elo_bin, away_elo_bin)

df_bn <- as.data.frame(df_bn)
```

```{r}
# Function to learn structure using MMHC

run_mmhc <- function(data,
                     ci.test = "mi",
                     alpha = 0.05,
                     score = "bic",
                     restart = 0,
                     blacklist = blacklist,
                     inc_blacklist = FALSE) {

  if (inc_blacklist) {
    bn.mmhc <- bnlearn::mmhc(
      x = data,
      restrict.args = list(test = ci.test, alpha = alpha),
      maximize.args = list(score = score, restart = restart),
      blacklist = blacklist
    )
  }
  else {
    bn.mmhc <- bnlearn::mmhc(
      x = data,
      restrict.args = list(test = ci.test, alpha = alpha),
      maximize.args = list(score = score, restart = restart)
    )
  }

  list(
    model = bn.mmhc,
    arcs = bnlearn::arcs(bn.mmhc),
    score = bnlearn::score(bn.mmhc, data)
  )
}

# Define edges not allowed
blacklist <- data.frame(
  from = "result",
  to = c("away_goal_difference_bin","away_current_exp_points_bin")
)

mmhc_run <- run_mmhc(df_bn, ci.test = "mi", alpha = 0.05, inc_blacklist = TRUE, blacklist = blacklist)

mmhc_score = mmhc_run$score
mmhc_model = mmhc_run$model

mmhc_fit <- bn.fit(mmhc_model, data = df_bn, method = "bayes")
```

```{r}
# Reversing some arcs that are markov equivalent

mmhc_model_reversed <- reverse.arc(mmhc_model, from = "home_current_exp_points_bin", to = "home_elo_bin")
mmhc_model_reversed <- reverse.arc(mmhc_model_reversed, from = "away_current_exp_points_bin", to = "away_elo_bin")
mmhc_model_reversed <- reverse.arc(mmhc_model_reversed, from = "away_goal_difference_bin", to = "away_current_exp_points_bin")
mmhc_model_reversed <- reverse.arc(mmhc_model_reversed, from = "home_goal_difference_bin", to = "home_current_exp_points_bin")

mmhc_reversed_fit <- bn.fit(mmhc_model_reversed, data = df_bn, method = "bayes")
```

```{r}
# Plotting DAG and CPDAG of the learnt model
cp <- cpdag(mmhc_model)
graphviz.plot(cp)
graphviz.plot(mmhc_model)
graphviz.plot(mmhc_model_reversed)
```

# Learning with bootstrapping

```{r}
# Get strength and direction values
boot <- boot.strength(
  df_bn,
  R = 500,
  algorithm = "mmhc",
  algorithm.args = list(
    blacklist = blacklist
  )
)
```

## Generating predictions from the learnt model

```{r}
predict_match_learned <- function(fitted_bn, evidence, n = 20000) {

  p_H <- cpquery(
    fitted_bn,
    event = (result == "H"),
    evidence = evidence,
    method = "lw",
    n = n
  )

  p_D <- cpquery(
    fitted_bn,
    event = (result == "D"),
    evidence = evidence,
    method = "lw",
    n = n
  )

  p_A <- cpquery(
    fitted_bn,
    event = (result == "A"),
    evidence = evidence,
    method = "lw",
    n = n
  )

  probs <- c(p_H = p_H, p_D = p_D, p_A = p_A)
  probs / sum(probs)
}

build_evidence_learned <- function(row, fitted_bn) {

  nodes <- names(fitted_bn)
  nodes <- setdiff(nodes, "result")

  ev <- lapply(nodes, function(v) as.character(row[[v]]))
  names(ev) <- nodes
  ev
}

predict_fixtures_learned <- function(fixtures_df, fitted_bn, n = 20000) {

  preds <- t(sapply(seq_len(nrow(fixtures_df)), function(i) {

    row <- fixtures_df[i, , drop = FALSE]

    evidence <- build_evidence_learned(row, fitted_bn)

    predict_match_learned(fitted_bn, evidence, n = n)
  }))

  cbind(fixtures_df, as.data.frame(preds))
}
```

```{r}
get_learnt_predictions_for_full_season <- function(
    season_int, historical_matches, season_tables, fitted_bn, results2526, current_gw) {
    
  matches_per_gameweek <- 10

  if (season_int == 2025) {
    season_results <- results2526 %>%
      rename(match_id = match_number) %>%
      filter(gameweek <= current_gw)
    season_results$season <- 2025
  } else {
  
    season_results <- historical_matches[historical_matches$season == season_int, ]
    season_results$match_id <- season_results$match_id - min(season_results$match_id) + 1
    
    season_results <- season_results %>%
    mutate(
      match_id = .[["match_id"]],
      gameweek = ceiling(as.numeric(match_id) / matches_per_gameweek)
    )
  }
  
  standings_by_gameweek <- build_standings_by_gw(season_results, matches_per_gameweek = matches_per_gameweek)
  
  standings_with_expected_points <- add_exp_points_to_standings(
    results = season_results,
    standings_by_gw = standings_by_gameweek,
    season_points = season_tables,
    compute_component1_mean = compute_component1_mean,
    cur_season = season_int + 1,
    matches_per_gameweek = matches_per_gameweek
  )
  
  # Calculate projected goal difference
  standings_with_expected_points$projected_goal_difference <- 
    standings_with_expected_points$goal_difference / 
    standings_with_expected_points$gameweek * 38
  
  # Rounding
  standings_with_expected_points <- standings_with_expected_points %>% 
    mutate(across("projected_goal_difference", round, 0))
  
  names(standings_with_expected_points)[names(standings_with_expected_points) == 'Mean'] <- 'current_exp_points'
  names(standings_with_expected_points)[names(standings_with_expected_points) == 'elo'] <- 'rating'
  
  standings_with_expected_points <- discretise_features(
    df = standings_with_expected_points
  )
  
  standings_with_expected_points$current_exp_points_bin <- 
    cut(standings_with_expected_points$current_exp_points,
        breaks = quantile(
          standings_with_expected_points$current_exp_points,
          probs = c(0, .33, .66, 1), na.rm=TRUE
        ),
        include.lowest = TRUE,
        labels = c("Low","Med","High"))
  
  # Merging on the node columns (expected points, goal difference, ELO) with fixtures
  # Merge on current points, goal difference and elo
  season_results <- season_results %>%
    left_join(
      standings_with_expected_points %>%
        dplyr::select("gameweek", "team", "goal_difference_bin", "elo_bin", "current_exp_points_bin") %>%
        rename(
          home_team                   = team,
          home_goal_difference_bin    = goal_difference_bin,
          home_elo_bin                = elo_bin,
          home_current_exp_points_bin = current_exp_points_bin
        ),
      by = c("home_team", "gameweek")
    ) %>%
    left_join(
      standings_with_expected_points %>%
        dplyr::select("gameweek", "team", "goal_difference_bin", "elo_bin", "current_exp_points_bin") %>%
        rename(
          away_team                   = team,
          away_goal_difference_bin    = goal_difference_bin,
          away_elo_bin                = elo_bin,
          away_current_exp_points_bin = current_exp_points_bin
        ),
      by = c("away_team", "gameweek")
    )
  
    # Generate predictions
    predictions <- predict_fixtures_learned(
      fixtures_df = season_results,
      fitted_bn = fitted_bn
    )
    
    return(predictions)
}
```

```{r}
learnt_current_predictions <- predict_fixtures_learned(current_fixtures, mmhc_reversed_fit)

learnt_all_predictions <- list()

for (season_int in (2000:2024)){
  message(glue("Generating predictions for season {season_int}/{season_int + 1}"))
  
  learnt_all_predictions[[as.character(season_int)]] <- 
    get_learnt_predictions_for_full_season(
      season_int = season_int,
      historical_matches = historical_matches,
      season_tables = season_tables,
      fitted_bn = mmhc_reversed_fit,
      results2526 = results_2526,
      current_gw = 28
    )
}
```

```{r}
for (season_int in (2000:2024)){
  
  learnt_all_predictions[[as.character(season_int)]]$predicted_outcome <- 
    c("H","D","A")[max.col(learnt_all_predictions[[as.character(season_int)]][, c("p_H","p_D","p_A")])]
  
  learnt_all_predictions[[as.character(season_int)]]$correct_prediction <-
    learnt_all_predictions[[as.character(season_int)]]$result == learnt_all_predictions[[as.character(season_int)]]$predicted_outcome  
  
  all_predictions[[as.character(season_int)]]$predicted_outcome <- 
    c("H","D","A")[max.col(all_predictions[[as.character(season_int)]][, c("p_H","p_D","p_A")])]
  
  all_predictions[[as.character(season_int)]]$correct_prediction <-
    all_predictions[[as.character(season_int)]]$result == all_predictions[[as.character(season_int)]]$predicted_outcome  
}
```


```{r}
# Generating RPS values for each season

pmat_list_SL <- list()
obs_vec_list_SL <- list()
rps_values_list_SL <- list()

for (season_int in 2000:2024){
  
  pmat_list_SL[[as.character(season_int)]] <- as.matrix(
    learnt_all_predictions[[as.character(season_int)]][, c("p_H", "p_D", "p_A")]
  )
  
  obs_vec_list_SL[[as.character(season_int)]] <- match(
    learnt_all_predictions[[as.character(season_int)]]$result, c("H", "D", "A")
  )
  
  rps_values_list_SL[[as.character(season_int)]] <- rps(
    obs = obs_vec_list_SL[[as.character(season_int)]], pred = pmat_list_SL[[as.character(season_int)]]
  )$rps

}

# Converting into dataframe
rps_values_SL <- data.frame(
  season = names(rps_values_list_SL),
  rps     = unlist(rps_values_list_SL)
)

# Adding reference row for pi football value
rps_values_SL[nrow(rps_values_SL) + 1,] = c("2010_pifootball", rps_values_pifoot1011$rps)
rps_values_SL[nrow(rps_values_SL) + 1,] = c("2011_pifootball", rps_values_pifoot1112$rps)
```

## Comparing learnt vs expert models

```{r}
rps_comparison <- rps_values %>%
      left_join(
        rps_values_SL %>%
          rename(
            rps_SL = rps
          ),
        by = c("season")
      )

rps_comparison$diff <- (as.numeric(rps_comparison$rps_SL) - as.numeric(rps_comparison$rps))

rps_comparison$rps <- as.numeric(rps_comparison$rps)
rps_comparison$rps_SL <- as.numeric(rps_comparison$rps_SL)

mean_SL_rps <- mean(as.numeric(rps_comparison$rps_SL))
mean_rps <- mean(as.numeric(rps_comparison$rps))

mean_rps; mean_SL_rps
```

```{r}
rps_long <- rps_comparison |>
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(rps, rps_SL),
    names_to = "model",
    values_to = "rps"
  )

rps_long$rps <- as.numeric(rps_long$rps)
```


## Plotting comparisons

```{r}
rps_comparison_plot <- ggplot(head(rps_long, 50), 
       aes(x = season, y = rps, color = model, group = model)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point() +

  geom_hline(data = means_df,
             aes(yintercept = mean_rps, color = model),
             linetype = "dashed") +
  
  geom_point(
    data = data.frame(
      season = c("2010", "2011"),
      rps = c(
        rps_long[rps_long$season == "2010_pifootball",]$rps[1],
        rps_long[rps_long$season == "2011_pifootball",]$rps[1]
      ),
      model = "Pi Football"
    ),
    aes(x = season, y = rps, color = model),
    size = 2
  ) +

  labs(
    title = "RPS Values for Expert and Learned Models",
    x = "Season Start Year",
    y = "RPS"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "rps" = "#F8766D",  
      "rps_SL" = "#00BFC4",     
      "Pi Football" = "black"
    ),
    labels = c(
      "rps" = "Expert Model",
      "rps_SL" = "Learnt Model",
      "Pi Football" = "Pi Football"
    )
  ) +
  labs(colour = NULL) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        legend.position = "bottom")

rps_comparison_plot
```
